meanings.definition: make into a whole or make part of a whole
examples: She incorporated his suggestions into her proposal

meanings.definition: open (a place) to members of all races and ethnic groups

examples: The students at this school integrate immediately, despite their different backgrounds

meanings.definition: calculate the integral of; calculate by integration
formed or united into a whole
formed into a whole or introduced into another entity; - Dwight D.Eisenhower
examples: a more closely integrated economic and political system

meanings.definition: not segregated; designated as available to all races or groups
resembling a living organism in organization or development
